en_title: 'We're Done Paying for Executives' Failures' — Unionized Xbox Developers Hold Press Conference to Make Their Point as Microsoft Reportedly Readies Massive Layoffs
cn_title: 《微软》XBOX工会召开发布会：拒绝为高管失败买单
subtitle: 「血洗」将至
opus_summary: XBOX工会召开发布会，抗议微软即将开始的「血洗」式裁员。工会要求提前通知、返聘权等保障，并指责微软一边涨价主机一边大举投资AI。发言人表示员工和玩家站在一起，拒绝为高管的失败买单。

paragraphs.en: Unionized Xbox employees are pushing back against the company's looming layoffs and have outlined various demands.
paragraphs.cn: 加入工会的XBOX员工正在抵制公司即将到来的裁员，并提出了多项诉求。

paragraphs.en: Earlier today, the CWA (Communications Workers of America) held a press conference in which various . The conference was held ahead of reported layoffs at Xbox, which insiders have stated will be a "bloodbath."
paragraphs.cn: 今天早些时候，美国通信工人协会（CWA）举行了一场新闻发布会，多位发言人在会上发言。发布会正值报道称XBOX即将裁员之际，内部人士称这将是一场「大血洗」。

paragraphs.en: It's also a painful reminder of last year's layoffs at Microsoft, where 9,000 people lost their jobs across the entire company (not just Xbox) and resulted in multiple projects being cancelled, including the long-awaited reboot of Perfect Dark. The studio behind that game, The Initative, was also shuttered without having ever released a game.
paragraphs.cn: 这也让人痛苦地想起去年微软的裁员，当时全公司（不仅仅是XBOX）有9,000人失业，导致多个项目被取消，包括备受期待的《完美黑暗》重启作。该游戏的开发商The Initative也在从未发布过任何游戏的情况下被关闭。

paragraphs.en: The upcoming layoffs reportedly puts more studios, such as Double Fine and Ninja Theory , at risk of closure. South of Midnight developer Complusion Games is also reportedly at risk of shutting down, despite winning a Peabody Award earlier this year. New Xbox boss Asha Sharma celebrated the win on her socials, months before the studio's reported demise: "A well-deserved recognition for storytelling that truly matters!"
paragraphs.cn: 据报道，即将到来的裁员将使更多工作室面临关闭风险，例如Double Fine和Ninja Theory。《午夜之南》开发商Complusion Games据称也面临关闭，尽管今年早些时候赢得了皮博迪奖。新任XBOX负责人Asha Sharma当时在社交媒体上庆祝了这一成就，几个月后，该工作室就传出了关闭消息：「真正重要的叙事，实至名归的认可！」

paragraphs.en: These developers are reportedly negotiating with Microsoft to find new owners or to go independent, but it remains to be seen what exactly will happen. Microsoft hasn't explicitly confirmed layoffs or studio closures to the public, but Sharma did state in a memo that the company will be performing a "reset" in order to better situate the company for the future. As a result, Xbox developers are fearful of their future.
paragraphs.cn: 据报道，这些开发商正在与微软谈判，寻找新的所有者或寻求独立，但究竟会发生什么还有待观察。微软尚未向公众明确确认裁员或关闭工作室，但Sharma在一份备忘录中表示，公司将进行「重置」，以便更好地为未来定位。因此，XBOX开发者对自己的未来感到担忧。

paragraphs.en: During the CWA press conference, speakers stated that they were growing frustrated as Microsoft hadn't given all of the union reps time to bargain, with one CWA member stating that Microsoft had sat on a proposal for four months. One member did give credit to Microsoft after the World of Warcraft bargaining team at Blizzard saw "real gains" this past weekend.
paragraphs.cn: 在CWA新闻发布会上，发言人表示他们越来越沮丧，因为微软没有给所有工会代表谈判时间，一位CWA成员称微软对一项提案搁置了四个月。一位成员也赞扬了微软，因为暴雪的《魔兽世界》谈判团队在上周末取得了「实质性进展」。

paragraphs.en: The speakers also outlined what they want from Microsoft, including advance notice of layoffs, two years recall rights (the ability to be rehired if their position is reopened after layoffs), adequate severance, voluntary severance to avoid involuntary layoffs, and for Microsoft to transfer impacted staff to other studios or roles within the larger company. They're also hoping to cement protections for all workers, not just those who are unionized.
paragraphs.cn: 发言人还概述了他们对微软的诉求，包括提前通知裁员、两年返聘权（如果裁员后职位重新开放，他们有权被重新雇用）、足够的遣散费、自愿离职方案以避免非自愿裁员，以及微软将受影响的员工转移到公司内部其他工作室或岗位。他们还希望为所有员工巩固保障，而不仅仅是加入工会的员工。

paragraphs.en: A Microsoft spokesperson told IGN that it is working with the CWA to find an appropriate agreement. "We respect the right of our team members to make their voices heard," said the spokesperson. "We have a long track record of good faith partnership with labor organizations, as demonstrated by the several finalized bargaining agreements our teams have reached with the CWA and our labor principles. We are continuing to negotiate in good faith with the CWA to reach agreements across XBOX."
paragraphs.cn: 一位微软发言人告诉IGN，该公司正在与CWA合作，以达成适当的协议。「我们尊重团队成员表达意见的权利，」发言人表示，「我们与劳工组织有着长期的良好合作记录，我们的团队与CWA达成的几项最终谈判协议以及我们的劳动原则就证明了这一点。我们正在与CWA真诚谈判，以在整个XBOX达成协议。」

paragraphs.en: During the press conference, speakers said they felt "expendable" and "dispensable."
paragraphs.cn: 在新闻发布会上，发言人说自己感到「可被牺牲」和「可有可无」。

paragraphs.en: "We refuse to be left in the dark as the company decides to restructure in a way that seriously affects us all," said ZeniMax Online Studios senior encounter designer Morgan Goin. "We're being treated as expendable, valued one week, and cut the next. Why would a game developer bother to put forward their best work under these conditions? Hard work and great games do not save you from layoffs under Microsoft. That's why we're coming together across Xbox to make our voices heard and to demand real accountability."
paragraphs.cn: 「我们拒绝在公司决定进行严重影响所有人的重组时被蒙在鼓里，」ZeniMax Online Studios高级遭遇设计师Morgan Goin说，「我们被视作可消耗品，一周被重视，下一周被砍。在这种条件下，游戏开发者为什么要费心交出最好的作品？在微软手下，努力工作和优秀游戏也不能让你免于裁员。这就是为什么我们联合起来，在整个XBOX发出我们的声音，要求真正的问责。」

paragraphs.en: Goin claimed that Microsoft's own actions have created problems others are now paying for. Last week, Xbox announced yet another price hike on consoles , which has been sparked by a component crisis. Heavy investment into AI has led to massive price increases on RAM, which in turn has caused issues with producing affordable consoles, and Microsoft is a significant player in the AI space.
paragraphs.cn: Goin声称，微软自身的行为制造了问题，现在却要别人来买单。上周，XBOX宣布了又一次游戏机涨价，这由组件危机引发。对人工智能的大量投资导致内存价格大幅上涨，进而影响了生产平价游戏机，而微软在AI领域是一个重要参与者。

paragraphs.en: "Even as the company calls us too costly to keep, it is raising console prices on players again, citing a RAM shortage that Microsoft itself has exacerbated," Goin continued. "Layoff rumors are swirling, players are paying more and executives are calling it a reset."
paragraphs.cn: 「即使公司说我们成本太高养不起，它还在再次提高游戏机价格，理由是内存短缺，而这正是微软自己加剧的，」Goin继续说道，「裁员传闻四起，玩家支付更多，高管却称之为重置。」

paragraphs.en: Diablo senior environment artist Mahreen Fatima echoed this sentiment, pointing out that Microsoft's investment in AI proves that the tech giant has plenty of money to go around. "Leadership points to revenue and margins to justify cutting us and then [last] week, raised console prices on players for the third time since 2025," said Fatima. "They are not short on money. Look at the billions that they're using to invest in AI. They're just choosing not to protect us."
paragraphs.cn: 《暗黑破坏神》高级环境美术师Mahreen Fatima表达了同样的观点，指出微软在AI上的投资证明这家科技巨头资金充裕。「领导层拿收入和利润率来证明裁掉我们是合理的，然后[上周]，自2025年以来第三次提高游戏机价格，」Fatima说，「他们不缺钱。看看他们用来投资AI的数十亿美元。他们只是选择不保护我们。」

paragraphs.en: Blizzard senior editor Alison Veneto stated that the lack of protections and looming layoffs make it harder for people to do their jobs, creating issues for those trying to make great games.
paragraphs.cn: 暴雪高级编辑Alison Veneto表示，缺乏保障和即将到来的裁员使人们更难完成工作，给那些试图制作优秀游戏的人带来了问题。

paragraphs.en: "My coworkers just want to focus on making amazing games for players," said Veneto. "They do not want to spend every day worrying about whether another round of layoffs is coming. It drains away the energy we should be using to be creative. We want layoffs to be treated not as a quick fix to a quarterly balance sheet, but only as an absolute last resort. But if they're truly unavoidable, we are asking Microsoft for common sense protections around layoffs and a real effort to lessen the burden on affected employees, not only for the workers at the bargaining table, but for everyone who will be affected by Xbox layoffs. Our game developers deserve that."
paragraphs.cn: 「我的同事只想专注于为玩家制作精彩的游戏，」Veneto说，「他们不想每天担心下一轮裁员是否会来。这消耗了我们本应用于创作的精力。我们希望裁员不被视为季度资产负债表的快速修正，而只是绝对的最后手段。但如果真的无法避免，我们请求微软提供关于裁员的常识性保障，并真正努力减轻受影响员工的负担，不仅是为了谈判桌上的员工，也是为了所有将受到XBOX裁员影响的人。我们的游戏开发者值得这样的待遇。」

paragraphs.en: It remains to be seen what will come of this, but Activision QA tester Andrew Snell and Fatima both made it clear that Microsoft's actions don't just impact workers, but also the players: "Workers and players are on the same side of this and we're done paying for executives' failures," said Snell.
paragraphs.cn: 事情将如何发展还有待观察，但动视QA测试员Andrew Snell和Fatima都明确表示，微软的行为不仅影响员工，也影响玩家：「员工和玩家站在同一边，我们不会再为高管的失败买单，」Snell说。

paragraphs.en: "We, the developers, demand that you respect our labor and our games," added Fatima. "Together we've built a huge community and touched the lives of millions of gamers everywhere. Don't disrespect the developers. Don't disrespect the gamers."
paragraphs.cn: 「我们，开发者，要求你尊重我们的劳动和我们的游戏，」Fatima补充道，「我们一起建立了一个庞大的社区，触动了世界各地数百万玩家的生活。不要不尊重开发者。不要不尊重玩家。」

paragraphs.en: Cade Onder is a freelancer for IGN's news team. He covers all things entertainment, including gaming, film, and more. You can find him on Twitter @Cade_Onder.
paragraphs.cn: Cade Onder是IGN新闻团队的自由撰稿人。他报道所有娱乐相关内容，包括游戏、电影等。你可以在X上找到他 @Cade_Onder。
